glosses.ja: したい気持ち; 欲求

sentences.target: Ich habe heute Lust auf Pizza.

translations.de: Ich habe heute Lust auf Pizza.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, j'ai envie de manger une pizza.
translations.pt: Hoje estou com vontade de comer pizza.
translations.nl: Vandaag heb ik zin in pizza.
translations.hi: आज पिज़्ज़ा खाने का मन है।
translations.nb: I dag har jeg lyst på pizza.
translations.id: Hari ini aku ingin makan pizza.
translations.sv: Idag är jag sugen på pizza.
translations.da: I dag har jeg lyst til pizza.
translations.ja: 今日はピザが食べたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the finite verb 'habe'.
Finite lexical verb (1st person singular, present); predicates having/feeling 'Lust' and licenses the PP complement to specify the object of desire.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; sets the time frame.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'habe'; head of a noun phrase that can take a PP (here 'auf Pizza') to indicate the target of desire.
Preposition introducing the PP complement to 'Lust'; marks 'Pizza' as the desired item.
Common noun as the object of the preposition 'auf'; denotes the target of desire.

sentences.target: Er hat keine Lust zu arbeiten.

translations.de: Er hat keine Lust zu arbeiten.
translations.fr: Il n'a pas envie de travailler.
translations.pt: Ele não está com vontade de trabalhar.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không muốn làm việc.
translations.nl: Hij heeft geen zin om te werken.
translations.hi: उसे काम करने का मन नहीं है।
translations.nb: Han har ikke lyst til å jobbe.
translations.sv: Han har ingen lust att jobba.
translations.da: Han har ikke lyst til at arbejde.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of 'hat'.
Finite lexical verb (3rd person singular, present); takes 'Lust' as its object and allows an infinitival clause specifying the activity.
Negative determiner modifying 'Lust'; denies the existence/quantity of desire.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'hat'; head of a noun phrase that can be complemented by a 'zu'-infinitive.
Infinitival particle marking the non-finite verb 'arbeiten'; introduces an infinitival clause modifying the noun 'Lust'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; together with 'zu' forms a non-finite clause specifying the activity related to 'Lust'.

sentences.target: Hanna hat Lust, spazieren zu gehen.

translations.de: Hanna hat Lust, spazieren zu gehen.
translations.en: Hanna feels like going for a walk.
translations.es: A Hanna le apetece dar un paseo.
translations.fr: Hanna a envie de se promener.
translations.it: Hanna ha voglia di fare una passeggiata.
translations.pt: Hanna está com vontade de passear.
translations.nl: Hanna heeft zin om een wandeling te maken.
translations.pl: Hanna ma ochotę iść na spacer.
translations.el: Η Χάνα έχει όρεξη να πάει βόλτα.
translations.nb: Hanna har lyst til å gå en tur.
translations.sv: Hanna är sugen på att ta en promenad.
translations.ro: Hanna are chef să iasă la plimbare.
translations.cs: Hanna má chuť jít na procházku.
translations.da: Hanna har lyst til at gå en tur.
translations.ja: ハンナは散歩に行きたい。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of 'hat'.
Finite lexical verb (3rd person singular, present); takes 'Lust' as its object and licenses an infinitival clause specifying the activity.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'hat'; head of the NP followed by an infinitival clause that indicates what the desire concerns.
Verbal particle (ADV) forming a separable verb with 'gehen' ('spazieren gehen'); here part of the infinitival predicate expressing the activity desired.
Infinitival particle marking 'gehen'; introduces the non-finite clause modifying 'Lust'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; together with the particle 'spazieren' forms the separable verb 'spazieren gehen' (to go for a walk).

sentences.target: Wir haben jetzt Lust auf Musik.

translations.de: Wir haben jetzt Lust auf Musik.
translations.en: We feel like listening to music now.
translations.fr: On a envie d'écouter de la musique maintenant.
translations.it: Adesso abbiamo voglia di ascoltare musica.
translations.pt: Agora estamos com vontade de ouvir música.
translations.vi: Bây giờ chúng tôi muốn nghe nhạc.
translations.ar: الآن نريد أن نستمع إلى الموسيقى.
translations.nl: Nu hebben we zin om naar muziek te luisteren.
translations.hi: अभी हमें संगीत सुनने का मन है।
translations.el: Τώρα έχουμε όρεξη να ακούσουμε μουσική.
translations.nb: Nå har vi lyst til å høre på musikk.
translations.sv: Nu är vi sugna på att lyssna på musik.
translations.ro: Acum avem chef să ascultăm muzică.
translations.da: Nu har vi lyst til at høre musik.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative plural; subject of 'haben'.
Finite lexical verb (1st person plural, present); predicates having/feeling 'Lust' and licenses a PP specifying the target of desire.
Temporal adverb; situates the event at the present moment.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'haben'; head of an NP that takes a PP ('auf Musik') as complement indicating the target.
Preposition heading the PP complement to 'Lust'; introduces 'Musik' as the desired thing.
Common noun as the object of 'auf'; denotes the target of desire.
